title: INDIAN INSTITUTE OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY KURNOOL
text_content: INDIAN INSTITUTE OF INFORMATION TECHNOLOGY KURNOOL Foundation Day Foundation Day Academic Achievement – Research Associate Academic Achievement – Research Associate Mahaparinirvan Diwas Mahaparinirvan Diwas Inter IIIT Sports Meet Inter IIIT Sports Meet Nasha Mukht Bharat, Har Ghar Tiranga, and the Unity March 7th Convocation 7th Convocation 7th Convocation MoU Signs MoU with AP Govt MoU with the University of Agder (UiA), Norway MoU with the University of Agder (UiA), Norway Foundation Day Academic Achievement – Research Associate Mahaparinirvan Diwas Inter IIIT Sports Meet Nasha Mukht Bharat, Har Ghar Tiranga, and the Unity March 7th Convocation 7th Convocation MoU MoU with the University of Agder (UiA), Norway Mission To become a center of excellence pioneering in education, research & development, and leaders in design & manufacturing. Vision To become a leading institute of higher learning in Information Technology enabled design & manufacturing to create technologies and technologists befitting the industries globally. Charter To carry out advanced research and development activities in design and manufacturing technologies, both on its own and on sponsorship basis for the industry. PROGRAMMES / ADMISSIONS A two days workshop on "FPGA Based System Design" during 27-28 March 2026 A two-day national conference on "Advanced materials for Sustainable Technologies" during 11-12th June 2026 The Women Computer Science Congress (WCC) on 13th March 2026, centered around the theme “Women Empowerment in STEM through AI” DST-ANRF Sponsored Two-Day Workshop on “Hands-on Training on Synthesis and Characterization of Nanomaterials for Hydrogen Energy” | 23–24 Mar 2026 List of provisionally selected candidates for the AICTE-QIP-PG Certificate Programme on “Drones” List of provisionally selected candidates for the AICTE-QIP-PG Certificate Programme on “Internet of Things” DST–ANRF Sponsored Two-Day Offline Workshop on “Quantum Materials: Fundamentals & Applications” | 06–07 Mar 202 6 IIITDM Kurnool Rated AAAA by Careers360 PhD Admissions on Drone Technology FDP on Advances in Semiconductor Technology for Next-Gen Devices (Dec 01–06, 2025) AICTE-ATAL FDP on Clean Energy Innovations for Viksit Bharat @2047 | 22–27 Dec 2025 Instructions: M.Tech Admissions (CCMT 2025) M.Tech (Self-Financed) – Selected List & Instructions FDP on Introduction to Robotics: Concepts, Applications & Hands-On in Hybrid Mode (14–20 July 2025) AICTE QIP PG Programme in Drone Technology List of Provisionally Selected FDP on Al-A Practical Approach for Teaching and Learning ( 07th April 2025 – 12th April 2025 ) FDP (Hybrid Mode) on "Emerging Trends in Photonics" March 10 – March 16, 2025 AICTE-QIP-PG CERTIFICATE PROGRAMME in 'Internet of Things' results One-Week FDP on "Machine Learning in Medical Imaging and Systems Biology" during 10-15, February 2025 Provisionally Selected Candidates for Ph.D. Admission – January 2025 Session One-week Online ATAL-AICTE Sponsored Faculty Development Program on " Importance of Artificial Intelligence in Robotics" (20th -25th January 2025) NEWS / JOBS ARMREB-DRDO sponsored research project (ARMREB/MAA/2025/306) -
